Meaning.En: A barrier, typically made of wood, metal, or wire, enclosing an area to prevent escape or intrusion.
Meaning.Example: We installed a wooden fence around the garden to keep the rabbits out.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống xây dựng hàng rào quanh khu đất hoặc vườn.
Situation.En: Scenario involving building or repairing a fence around a property or garden.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống trong thể thao (môn đấu kiếm).
Situation.En: Scenario in fencing sport, where "fence" can refer to the match itself (e.g., "They fenced for 15 minutes").

Meaning.Vi: Rào lại; xây hàng rào; ngăn cách
Meaning.En: To surround or enclose (an area) with a fence; also, to engage in the sport of fencing.
Meaning.Example: The farmer fenced in his pasture to protect the livestock.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống xây dựng hoặc lắp đặt hàng rào.
Situation.En: Scenario involving the act of putting up a fence around a property.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống thi đấu đấu kiếm.
Situation.En: Scenario where two people compete in a fencing match.
